ch4_start.text: You wake up to the blaring of the station's PA system. 'Attention. Mess Hall lockdown in effect. Mandatory rationing protocols activated.' The air feels heavier. Paranoia is setting in across the station.

ch4_mess_hall.text: The Mess Hall is sealed, but you slip in using your auditor override codes. Otto Finch, the quartermaster, is desperately inventorying the pantry. 'Half the high-calorie reserves are gone!' he mutters. Then, a static-filled voice crackles from the kitchen radio.
ch4_mess_hall.speaker: Radio

ch4_radio.text: '...drill team alpha... it's in the walls... help us...' The voice sounds exactly like Commander Vance, who died in the initial breach 24 hours ago.

ch4_otto_freakout.text: Otto slams the radio off. 'It's a glitch! Magnetic echoes! Just like the missing food... probably an inventory glitch!' He is sweating profusely.
ch4_otto_freakout.speaker: Otto

choices.text: Accuse him. 'You're stealing the food, Otto.'
'Otto, calm down. Where did the food go?'

ch4_confront_otto_harsh.text: Otto looks terrified. 'I didn't steal it! I've been leaving scraps in the vents! There's a stowaway! A kid!' He points shakily to the large ventilation shaft above the stove.
ch4_confront_otto_harsh.speaker: Otto

ch4_confront_otto_calm.text: Otto sighs, trembling. 'I haven't been eating it. I've been... feeding someone. There's a stowaway in the vents. A little girl.' He points to the ventilation shaft.
ch4_confront_otto_calm.speaker: Otto

ch4_vent.text: You pry open the heavy grate. Deep inside the ductwork, a pair of wide, terrified eyes stares back at you. It's a young girl, no older than ten, clutching a rationing bar.

choices.text: 'It's okay. Come out. I'm not going to hurt you.'
Reach in and grab her arm. 'Get out here now.'

ch4_maya_trust.text: She hesitates, then slowly crawls out. 'I'm Maya,' she whispers. 'The monsters took my brother.'
ch4_maya_trust.speaker: Maya

choices.text: Assure her she is safe here and leave.

ch4_maya_fear.text: She screams and scrambles further back into the dark vents, out of reach. 'Leave me alone!' she cries.
ch4_maya_fear.speaker: Maya

choices.text: Leave her there and exit the Mess Hall.
